Let's Work Together

Book DJ Jade

Bring the 504 energy to your event. Available for clubs, festivals, private parties, and corporate bookings nationwide.

Club Nights

Residencies, guest sets, late-night headliners

Festivals

Outdoor stages, multi-day events, brand activations

Private Events

Weddings, birthdays, milestone celebrations

Corporate

Launches, galas, team events, rooftop parties

Inquiry Form

* required · typically replied within 24–48 hrs

How It Works

  1. 01

    Submit Inquiry

    Fill out the form below with your event details.

  2. 02

    Receive a Quote

    I'll reply with availability and pricing within 48 hrs.

  3. 03

    Confirm & Deposit

    Sign the agreement and lock in your date.

  4. 04

    Experience the Heat

    Show up and let the energy take over.

What's Included

  • ✓Professional DJ gear & setup
  • ✓Custom curated playlist
  • ✓MC services & crowd hype
  • ✓Pre-event planning call
  • ✓Travel within NOLA region
